verses.text: Israel mite, a nung kawikawi huih tawh kibang a, sun thapai-a a nasepna uh a mawkna ahi hi. Zuauna leh siatna lamsang bekbek khangsak uh hi. Assiria-te tawh kipawlna bawl uh a, Egypt-te tawh kizopna nei uh hi
Topa in Israel mite a mawhsakna ding a thu om hi. Jakob a gamtatna tawh kizui-in gim pia ding a, ama gamtatna bangin thukkik ding hi
Jakob in a nu sung nangawn pek panin a sanggampa sawk pah a, a khangham ciangin zong Pasian tawh kilai hi
Vantung mi tawh kilai-in a lel hi. Tua ciangin Jakob zong kapin ama tung panin hehpihna a ngen hi. Pasian in Bethel munah amah mu-in a hopih hi
Ama min pen Topa, Vanglian Topa Pasian ahi hi
Pasian' huhna tawh note khempeuh kiheikik un la, thuman thutangin gamta un. Pasian muang tawntung un
Sumbukte in tawitehna manlo zang uh a, amaute in mi khem ding nuam a sa uh hi
Israel mite in, “Tu-in ka hau uh a, kote-a' dingin neihsa tampi ka ngah uh hi,” ci uh hi. Ahi zongin a hauhnateng un a mawhnateng uh loh zolo hi
Egypt gamah na omlai pek uha kipanin kei pen note' Topa Pasian ka hi a, ahi zongin tu-in tanglai hun bangin puanbuk sungah note kong tengsak kik ding hi
Kamsangte tungah thu ka gen hi. Maangmuhna a banbanin pia-in, kamsangte tungah thugentehna tawh thu a genpa zong keimah ka hi hi

Gilead gamah milim biakna om a, tuate a kiman'na omlo hi. Gilgal gamah bawngtal tawh bia uh a, lokhote in a suang deihlohteng uh a phualphualin a cian kawikawi tawh kibangin, a biakna taute uh bangmahin kimanglo ding hi
Aram gamah Jakob tai a, Israel in tua lai-ah zi khat thalawhin na sem a, zi thalawhna-in tuu a cing hi
Topa in kamsang khat zangin Egypt panin Israel-te paikhiatpih a, kamsang khat' nasepna tawh amaute suakta-in a nungta uh hi
Heh mahmah theihna dingin Israel mite gamta uh ahih manin amaute' Topa in amau' tung mahah a mawhna uh tungsak ding a, amaute' mawhna mah a thuaksak ding hi.
